mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO question_knowledge (question_id, knowledge_id, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES
(#{item.questionId}, #{item.knowledgeId}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.createUser}, #{item.updateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT k.id AS id, k.name AS name FROM question_knowledge qk JOIN knowledge k ON qk.knowledge_id = k.id WHERE qk.question_id = #{id}
